template.name: Signal Monitor — Hiring Posture Watcher
template.description: Recurring weekly hiring-trigger monitor across an ICP account watchlist. Detects when target accounts start hiring for the role categories that buy your product (e.g. RevOps Director, Head of GTM Engineering). Predictleads or Claygent LinkedIn jobs scan; severity-tiered routing.
template.estimated_cost_per_row: 3-7 credits per watched account per refresh cycle
template.expected_match_rate: Predictleads ~90% on US accounts; Claygent fallback ~70%

columns.name: account_tier
columns.notes: T1 / T2 / T3 from upstream account workbook

columns.name: hiring_signal
columns.notes: Returns: list of open roles matching keyword filter, posted dates

columns.name: hiring_claygent_fallback
columns.run_condition: due_for_check = TRUE AND hiring_signal IS NULL
columns.claygent_prompt:
Scan LinkedIn jobs page + /careers for {company_name} ({linkedin_company_url}).

Filter to roles matching: {{TARGET_ROLE_KEYWORDS}}.

Return JSON: {"matching_roles": [{"title": "", "posted_date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "url": ""}], "total_matches": int, "any_posted_in_last_14d": bool}.

columns.name: signal_severity
columns.formula_text: IF(recency_signal == "NONE", "NONE", IF(AND(account_tier == "T1", recency_signal == "FRESH"), "HOT", IF(AND(account_tier IN ["T1", "T2"], recency_signal == "FRESH"), "WARM", "COLD")))

columns.name: play_recommended
columns.formula_text: IF(signal_severity == "HOT", CONCAT("SDR_NOW with role context: ", hiring_consolidated.matching_roles[0].title), IF(signal_severity == "WARM", "AE_2WK_FOLLOWUP", IF(signal_severity == "COLD", "MONITOR", "NONE")))

columns.name: alert_message
columns.formula_text:
CONCAT("📈 *Hiring signal — ", signal_severity, "*
", company_name, " (Tier ", account_tier, ") posted ", hiring_consolidated.total_matches, " matching role(s)
Hottest: ", hiring_consolidated.matching_roles[0].title, " (", hiring_consolidated.matching_roles[0].posted_date, ")
Link: ", hiring_consolidated.matching_roles[0].url, "
Play: ", play_recommended)

verification_checklist: Watch list count matches account workbook T1+T2 count
First weekly run completes within 60 min for ≤300 accounts
Known fresh hiring signal in watchlist surfaces as HOT on a T1
Role keyword filter is tight enough — verify 3/5 surfaced roles actually map to your buyer category
Slack alert shows actual posted_date (not today's date) — common Claygent parse bug
Account tier T3 → never HOT (severity formula respects tier gate)
